author: han0110
content: It's a new release on upstream that cause Ere script fails, will update Ere tomorrow to fix that

author: han0110
content:
We can add support of single Ere server instance with multiple ELFs, but it'd require a starting cost when swapping ELF every time.

Sharing the same GPU for multiple Ere servers is doable for ZisK in theory, for other zkvVMs I'd need to check a bit.
